author: cvuosalo
body:
While developing the code to create the simulation geometry XML DB payload with DD4hep, I validated my code by checking each geometry component between old DD and DD4hep. These checks revealed some bugs in the DD4hep geometry code, and this PR fixes those bugs.

In `DDEcalBarrelNewAlgo.cc` I named all the rotations for consistency, since the code was already using some named rotations. I also clarified some rotation names, to make it easier to check rotations. One solid had the wrong name, and it was fixed.

In `Geometry/TrackerCommonData/data/PhaseI/v2/pixfwd*DiskZ*.xml` some solids had identical names. Each name was changed to be unique.

In `DDTECModuleAlgo.cc` two different solids had the same name, which propagated to their corresponding logical volumes. Their names were made unique.

In `DDTIBLayerAlgo.cc` two solids had slightly incorrect sizes, which were corrected.

#### PR validation:

The full XML geometry descriptions for old DD and DD4hep were compared to check these fixes corrected the discrepancies between them. Also, the 11634.911 DD4hep workflow was run successfully.

These fixes could be backported to 11_3, but I'm not sure if that is really necessary.
title: [DD4hep] Fix bugs revealed by geometry validation during DB payload development
